## Checklist

- [ ] Follows [document writing conventions](../CONTRIBUTING.md#4-document-writing-conventions)
- [ ] Each new/modified document has a `>` blockquote summary at the top
- [ ] Each new/modified document has a `## Verification` section at the end
- [ ] Code blocks specify the language tag (` ```bash `, ` ```typescript `, etc.)
- [ ] Cross-references are consistent (README.md, 00-index.md, CLAUDE.md updated if needed)
- [ ] Version references match `TECH-STACK.md`
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits format (`docs(<scope>): <subject>`)
